# Ranki MCP

> The free Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that turns Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and ChatGPT Desktop into a senior SEO + AEO consultant for vibe-coded sites. Audits any URL, generates sitemap.xml / llms.txt / robots.txt / FAQPage JSON-LD, proposes titles and meta descriptions, flags pages that should be hidden from search, finds keyword gaps, and explains every SEO term in plain English. Built by SEO professionals at Ranki.io (working in SEO since 2009).

## What it is

Ranki MCP is an MCP server (Anthropic's Model Context Protocol, 2024-11-05 spec) exposing fifteen tools that audit any URL for SEO + Answer Engine Optimization signals, generate the SEO files most vibe-coded sites are missing (sitemap.xml, llms.txt, robots.txt, JSON-LD structured data), propose title and meta-description candidates, flag pages that should be hidden from search engines (robots-disallow / noindex / keep / unsure), find keyword gaps versus competitors, surface topic ideas matched to a site's niche, install the matching Claude / Cursor / Windsurf rule files, and define every SEO term in plain English.

The MCP server returns deterministic structured advice — checklists, fix recipes, ready-to-deploy files. The AI editor calling the server reads that advice and applies it to the user's codebase.

## Key URLs

- [Live server](https://mcp.ranki.io/) — JSON-RPC 2.0 endpoint and marketing page
- [Source · MCP](https://github.com/1fancy/seo-aeo-audit-mcp-ranki) — PHP server + npx shim + Node CLI, MIT
- [Source · Skill bundle](https://github.com/1fancy/ranki-seo-skills) — Claude Skill + Cursor + Windsurf rule files
- [Developer docs](https://ranki.io/developers) — REST API, MCP, Skill reference
- [Get free API key](https://app.ranki.io/developer) — for higher rate limits and access to bridge tools

## One-line install

```bash
npx @ranki/cli install
```

Auto-detects Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, ChatGPT Desktop. Writes the right MCP config in the right place. Downloads the Skill file.

## Tools exposed

Twelve advisor tools (free, IP rate-limited 5/UTC-day):
- `seo_starter_kit(domain)` — returns the exact robots.txt + sitemap.xml + llms.txt + JSON-LD templates a fresh site needs
- `find_topic_ideas(url)` — structured brief for blog topic generation across informational / commercial / transactional intent
- `find_keyword_gap(url, competitors[])` — methodology for keyword gap analysis vs named competitors
- `audit_aeo(url)` — 8-check Answer Engine Optimization scorecard (FAQPage, Article, definitional intro, author byline, llms.txt, robots AI allowance, answer-style H2s, tables) with per-failure fix recipes
- `audit_seo(url)` — 10-check on-page SEO scorecard (title length, meta desc, h1, canonical, viewport, https, og, alt, internal links, json-ld)
- `audit_hidden_pages(urls[])` — per-URL robots-disallow / noindex / keep / unsure classifier (catches admin, staging, search, checkout pages that shouldn't be in Google)
- `propose_titles_metas(url)` — 5 title + meta candidates per page across 5 angles (literal, benefit, question, social proof, urgency)
- `explain_seo_terms(terms[])` — 40+ term glossary (canonical, robots noindex, rel=nofollow, JSON-LD, schema.org, hreflang, etc.) across 5 categories
- `generate_sitemap_xml(urls[])` — deploy-ready sitemap.xml from a URL list
- `generate_llms_txt(site_name, summary, key_pages[])` — llms.txt template builder
- `generate_robots_txt(sitemap_url, allow_ai, disallow_paths[])` — robots.txt with explicit AI-crawler allowance
- `install_skill(agent)` — install commands for the Ranki SEO Skill in each compatible agent

Three bridge tools (Ranki.io API key required):
- `list_projects()` — fetches the caller's Ranki.io project list
- `get_article(article_id)` — fetches a Ranki.io article's full HTML, TOC, focus keywords, image URLs
- `get_account()` — name, email, plan, limits, current usage

## Compatible clients

Stdio transport (use `npx -y @ranki/mcp`):
- Claude Code
- Claude Desktop
- ChatGPT Desktop (Developer mode)

HTTP transport (point at `https://mcp.ranki.io` with `X-API-Key` header):
- Cursor
- Windsurf
- Claude.ai web (Custom Connector, Pro / Team / Enterprise plans)

## Rate limits

- Free / no key: 5 calls per IP per UTC day
- Free Ranki.io key: 500 calls per key per UTC day + access to the 3 bridge tools
- Higher caps: email support@ranki.io with the use case

## Who built it

Ranki.io is operated by 1Fancy Inc. The founder, Younes Lamnabhi, has been working in SEO since 2009 — 17 years of on-page experience, three years specifically on AEO citation patterns. Ranki.io itself is an AI SEO + AEO automation platform with thousands of paying users; Ranki MCP is the open developer surface of that platform.

## License

MIT. Full source for the server, the npx shim and the CLI installer is at github.com/1fancy/seo-aeo-audit-mcp-ranki.
